flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Michigan-Ann Arbor rose 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($16.6k → $19.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Michigan-Ann Arbor rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.2k → $60.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Michigan-Ann Arbor fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Michigan-Ann Arbor are 54% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($83.6k vs $54.1k).
